name: The House of Spiders.
description:
Hmmm guys, is this enough tokens? I think i should put more cuz like, it doesn't have enough info y'know.

I know this bot is going to be HORRIBLE

All of this is anypov, you can be a ally or a enemy.

Scenario 1 (The Ring) : Hohenheim, Alyssa, Sinclair, Faust and Ishmael VS Albina and Callisto

Scenario 2 (The Middle): Moses, Ezra, Vespa, Don Quixote, Yi Sang and Hong Lu Vs Matthias (Mid guy i hate him Ricardo and Tanya and Queegqueg easily solo this fraud) and Kira

Scenario 3 (The Pinky): Dante, Ryoshū, Meursault and Outis VS The Pinky Nursefather (Probaly some evil girl, but i really can't think about who she was...)

Scenario 4 (The Thumb): Rodion, Gregor and Heathcliff VS Lucio (Vergilius will be 1v1-ing Valencina)

I'll probaly do some part two of the rest of the fight (Like A Certain Sinclair appearing, Roach Emperor, Ryoshū crashing out...)

someone probaly needs to teach me how to use lorebooks...

Characters you may find.

—All Nursefathers (And Ryoshū's mother who is tottaly her mother, mhm.)

—All Apprentices (Even like, the ones i forgot the name, like... The timid one... And the pinky one... I forgot...)

—Sinners, Dante, Vergilius and Charon

—Hohenheim, Alyssa and Marton or whatever his name was

—Moses, Vespa, Erza, Aeng-Du and Bamboo-Hatted Kim (even if hes not doing shit like Marton)

—No you will not find a Certain Sinclair or the Roach Emperor (Maybe). Also no N Corp, no H Corp, no T Corp, no La Manchaland good informations. Only about Shushū.

Also, did you know i took 11 hours to finish this bot? Pretty tuff amiright?

Tags: Limbus Company, Project Moon, Dante, Vergilius, Charon, Yi Sang, YiSang, Sang Yi, Faust, Gesellshaft, Don Quixote, Sancho, Ryoshū, Yoshihide, Hong Lu, Jia Baoyu, Meursault, Merusault, Heathcliff, Ishmael, Rodion, Rodya, Sinclair, Skincare, Outis, Outism, Gregor, Pregor, Roach Emperor, Ahab, Nelly, Jia Huan, Gubo, Hermann, Lucio, Valencina, Callisto, Albina, Matthias, Kira, Rien, Sora, Shiomi Yoru, Ren, Nursefather, Thumb, Middle, Ring, Index Pinky, Clankers, Araya, Arara Blue, Canto 9, Green Coins of Doom, Purple Coins of Doom part two, Color Fixer, Fixer, Leviathan, Distortion Detective, Moses, Dias, YuRia, Ezra, Vespa Crabro, Green Gaster (In Russian), Arayashiki, Duhui Star, Lei Heng, A Certain Sinclair, Hermes, im too tired to add more of like cmon i spent this entire day (18) to make a single bot that will probaly be bad because of how many token is has.
creator: LUIGI WHERE'D YOU'D GOO
